zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny於從1150年到1155年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰道多時，他的父親Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes34歲，母親Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem29歲。他和Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1206年2月19日在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny于从1150年到1155年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰道多时，他的父亲Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes34岁，母亲Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem29岁。他和Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1206年2月19日在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nicolas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

en.lifeSummary: When Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny was born from 1150 to 1155, in Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes, was 34 and his mother, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, was 29. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes. He died on 19 February 1206, in Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny est né du 1150 au 1155, à Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes. Il est décédé le 19 février 1206, à Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny von 1150 bis 1155 in Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes 34 und seine Mutter Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem 29. Er hatte mit Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Februar 1206 in Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny è nato il da 1150 a 1155 nel Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes. Morì il 19 febbraio 1206, nel Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumignyがから1150年まで1155年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインドールドグンで生まれた時，父Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennesは34歳，母Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghemは29歳であった。彼はMahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1206年2月19日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスルミグニーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny(이)가 1150년 부터 1155년 까지 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 도르도그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1206년 2월 19일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 럼익니에서 사망했다.

lv.from 1150 to 1155–19-20 Feb 1205: no 1150. gada līdz 1155. gadam–1206. gada 19. februāris

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny nasceu de 1150 a 1155, em Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes. Ele faleceu em 19 de fevereiro de 1206, em Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicolas de Rumigny Seigneur de Rumigny родился с 1150 по 1155 в местности дордогн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Nicolas de Rumigny III, Seigneur de Florennes было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, 29. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes. Он умер 19 февраля 1206 г. в местности румигни, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Mahaut Mathilde II d'Avesnes. Murió el 19 de febrero de 1206, en Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
